ほれほれ、小僧！ ぜーんぜん、飲んでおらぬではないか！<br>もっと、ぐいーっと:
Come on, boy! You're not drinking at all! How about you chug it, chug
it!
なに……？ この後、仕事がある……じゃとぉ？<br>ほぉ……ワシの酒に付き合うよ:
What's that? ... You say you've got work after this? ... Hoh? So you've
got something more important than drinking with old Gemma, eh?
なーんて、冗談じゃ♪ ただお主が、最近働きすぎていると思ってのぉ。<br>たまに:
Just kidding!♪ I just thought you've been working too hard. If you
don't unwind sometimes, you'll burn out!
アリシアには、ワシに無理矢理付き合わされたとでも言えばよい。遅れた仕事も<br>:
Tell Alicia I dragged you along. I'll help you catch up. So don't worry,
just chug it down, chug it down!
ほっほっほっ、いい飲みっぷりじゃ♪<br>その調子で、いつまでも健やかでいるのじ:
Ho ho ho, now that's the way to drink!♪ Keep it up and stay healthy
forever, boy!♪
